title: JustTimm's Vanilla Additions - Mod Support Add-On
description: This pack adds compatibility for some mods to JustTimm's Vanilla Additions.
body:
[![Button](https://i.imgur.com/SmYmaZZ.png)](https://server.pro/?ref=JustTimmsAdditions "Sponsored by Server.pro")
[🖥️**Java**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions) | [🎮**Bedrock**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft-bedrock/addons/justtimms-vanilla-additions-bedrock) | [⚙️**Mod Support**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-mod-support-add-on) | [🌙**Dark GUI**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-dark-gui-add-on) | [🍁**Autumn Edition**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-autumn-edition) | [❄️**Winter Edition**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-winter-edition) | [🎅🏻**Xmas Add-On**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-winter-edition)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Vanilla Additions - Mod Support Add-On is a Resource Pack that allows some mods (view Features tab) to be compatible with Vanilla Additions. This pack has two main purposes: to make using Sodium with OptiFine replacement mods [(see list here for OptiFine replacement mods)](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1nKb_A1zNveUQ2Wk8ACUVzZ2kL15OIiToW3UwW7j-SOs/edit) better and to make other mods seamlessly work with [Vanilla Additions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions). You can find Vanilla Additions - Mod Support Add-On on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-mod-support-add-on) and [PlanetMinecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/vanilla-additions-mod-support-add-on/)! You **must** use the original Vanilla Additions pack alongside this one, or the pack will not work correctly. If you want to suggest a mod to use, join the JustTimm's Additions Discord server below *(under Socials)* and make a suggestion in #💡suggestions with the "VA Mod Support" tag. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[📰**Twitter**](https://twitter.com/JT_Additions) | [📸**Instagram**](https://www.instagram.com/justtimms_additions) | [💬**Discord**](https://discord.gg/runTSv2) | [📽️**YouTube**](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCV4vHsM-p6GXsJTU-S7GSLQ?view_as=subscriber) | [📱**TikTok**](https://www.tiktok.com/@justtimms_additions) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
- Can be used with Fabric or Forge. - Can be used with or without OptiFine (see OptiFine replacement mod list above) - You don't have to use all the supported mods. Supported mods:
- 🍎[**Appleskin**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/appleskin) - 🚫[**No Chat Reports**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/no-chat-reports) *(GUI)* - 📄[**Mod Menu**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modmenu) *(GUI)* - 🦸[**Fabric Capes**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/capes) *(GUI)* - ⌛[**ViaFabric**](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabric) *(GUI)* - 🌈[**Iris Shaders**](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) *(GUI)* - 🧟[**Entity Texture Features**](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) *(GUI)* And more mods in the future! ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[![Button](https://i.imgur.com/e5quQk0.png)](https://server.pro/?ref=JustTimmsAdditions "Sponsored by Server.pro") ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
You are **FREE** to: - Use this pack on your server. - Alter the pack for personal use. - Combine with other packs for personal use and play. - Use this pack in YouTube videos. (Credit is appreciated) You are **NOT** allowed to: - Claim ownership over the textures/models in this pack. - Reupload the entire resource pack elsewhere. - Redistribute unedited individual assets from the pack without permission and credit. - Redistribute edited assets from the pack without permission and credit. Thanks in advance. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[![Button](https://i.imgur.com/bup8Qya.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions "Download Vanilla Additions") [![Button](https://i.imgur.com/8KYWZp6.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-autumn-edition "Download Vanilla Additions - Autumn Edition") [![Button](https://i.imgur.com/VCHp1x4.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-winter-edition "Download Vanilla Additions - Winter Edition") [![Button](https://i.imgur.com/XOj3uj4.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/justtimms-vanilla-additions-dark-gui-add-on "Download Vanilla Additions - Dark GUI Add-On")
